---
title: "installations_MB2026"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r install, echo=FALSE}
#readr
install.packages(readr)

#tidyverse
install.packages("tidyverse")

# microbiome
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
install.packages("BiocManager")

# ggpubr
if(!require(devtools)) install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("kassambara/ggpubr")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install(c("phyloseq", "microbiome", "ComplexHeatmap"), update = FALSE)

# gghaves
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("erocoar/gghalves")

install.packages("microViz", 
                 repos = c(davidbarnett = "https://david-barnett.r-universe.dev", 
                           getOption("repos")))

# corncob
if (!require("remotes")) install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("statdivlab/corncob")


# microbiomeutilities
install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("microsud/microbiomeutilities")

install.packages("ggpubr")

install.packages("ggthemes")


if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install("microbiome")


if (!requireNamespace("devtools", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("devtools")

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install(c("phyloseq", "microbiome"))

devtools::install_github("microsud/microbiomeutilities")

#maaslin3
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("biobakery/maaslin3")

```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
